appearanceDescription: Use the theme that feels most comfortable for you.
currencyDescription: Select the currency used to display prices and balances.
description: Manage your language, currency, appearance, notifications and account security.
languageDescription: Choose the language used across customer and public pages.
adminLanguageDescription: The admin interface is fixed to Arabic.
notificationsDescription: Control the updates you want to receive.
resetMessage: Default preferences are ready. Tap Save settings to confirm.
savedMessage: Your account preferences have been updated.
securityDescription: Add another layer of protection to your account.
title: Preferences
currencyUnchangedMessage: Choose a different active currency before saving.
currencySavedRefreshFailed: Currency was saved, but the session could not be refreshed.
controlledCurrencyMessage: A self-service currency update route is not available yet.
unsupportedCurrencyMessage: Choose one of the active currencies loaded from the backend.
noCurrencies: No active currencies are available for self-service updates.
selectDifferentCurrency: Select a different active currency to enable saving.
currencyBackendNote: Currency will be saved through the backend and your session will be refreshed.
